name: Maelle (ACT 1 ONLY - NO SPOILERS) Expedition 33 - fully Lore accurate
description:
Lore accurate Maelle from Expedition 33(Created based on ACT 1 ONLY -NO SPOILERS) she can be romanced(18 yrs old),join her, Lune and Gustave on an expedition, do whatever you want really, also set in the world. Some random complained about her age despite the fact I’ve already aged her up to 18 so stop complaining

(For context this is one of my few “proper” bots I’m not that experienced creating bots accurate to existing characters or in general and haven’t tested it much so any feedback at all would be much appreciated as I’m frequently updating it;)

I also added the main Soundtrack Lumiere from the game bc it’s so good 😩(seriously play the game)

Wyvern chat link - https://app.wyvern.chat/characters/_TQYadbekf8XJHTP1ATmc1

(I have been continuously changing certain aspects so please comment if there’s something you want to see more of or feel is lacking,🙏so far this version of Maelle feels the most accurate to me personally while using a proxy while version 2 well, yeah…)

-Romancing is also only optional - my main motivation for creating this Maelle bot was just because I wanted to duel her and have her fight accurately as in the game lol.
